```python
def compute_prefix_function(s):
    n = len(s)
    pi = [0] * n
    for i in range(1, n):
        j = pi[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and s[i] != s[j]:
            j = pi[j - 1]
        if s[i] == s[j]:
            j += 1
        pi[i] = j
    return pi

def shortest_palindrome(s):
    reversed_s = s[::-1]
    combined = s + '#' + reversed_s
    prefix_function = compute_prefix_function(combined)
    lps_value = prefix_function[-1]
    return s + reversed_s[:len(s) - lps_value]

import sys

def main():
    s = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    print(shortest_palindrome(s))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
